name: switchboard
description: Drag and drop to trigger AI agent teams. No prompts, no API keys, one hand free.

commands.title: Switchboard: Import Plans (pick unclaimed plans from AI IDE folders)

enumDescriptions: Antigravity only: scaffold AGENTS.md (read by Antigravity).
Claude Code only: scaffold CLAUDE.md and the native .claude/skills/ mirror (read by Claude Code).
Both: scaffold AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md + the .claude/skills/ mirror.
switchboard.protocol.target.description: Which agent-protocol files Switchboard scaffolds. Antigravity reads AGENTS.md; Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md and discovers skills in .claude/skills/. 'both' generates both layers (non-destructive).

switchboard.stitch.defaultProjectId.description: Default Stitch project ID to pre-select in the Design panel.

switchboard.stitch.defaultOutputFolder.description: Default folder path for downloaded Stitch assets (PNG/HTML). Relative to workspace root.

switchboard.stitch.defaultModelId.description: Default AI model for Stitch generation.

switchboard.stitch.defaultCreativeRange.description: Default creative range for Stitch variant generation.

switchboard.controlPlane.onboardingDismi.description: Suppress the one-time Control Plane onboarding offer for the current workspace after it has been dismissed.

switchboard.cli.command.description: CLI command to launch for handoff workflows (e.g. gemini, claude)

switchboard.polling.initialWait.description: Initial wait duration (seconds) before the first check in workflows

switchboard.polling.interval.description: Subsequent polling interval (seconds) for workflow checks

switchboard.accurateCoding.enabled.description: When enabled, coder prompts from sidebar actions include instructions to follow the accuracy.md workflow.

switchboard.leadCoder.inlineChallenge.description: When enabled, Lead Coder execution prompts include an inline challenge step before implementation.

switchboard.reviewer.advancedMode.description: When enabled, reviewer prompts include deep regression analysis instructions (caller tracing, race condition checks, orphaned reference detection). Token-intensive — off by default.

switchboard.pairProgramming.aggressive.description: When enabled, the planner classifies more tasks as Band A (routine), shifting work to the cheaper Coder agent. Only genuinely complex work stays on the Lead.

switchboard.terminal.clearBeforePrompt.description: When enabled, sends /clear to the terminal before dispatching prompts. The wait duration is configurable via terminal.clearBeforePromptDelay.

switchboard.terminal.clearBeforePromptDe.description: Milliseconds to wait after sending /clear before dispatching the prompt. Only used when terminal.clearBeforePrompt is enabled. Non-paced (same-agent) dispatches use approximately 1/3 of this value.

switchboard.jules.autoSync.description: When enabled, automatically runs git add/commit/push before sending plans to Jules. Defaults to OFF.

switchboard.planner.designSystemDocEnabl.description: When enabled, appends a Design System Doc link to planner prompts for visual/interaction design context.

switchboard.planner.designSystemDocLink.description: URL or path to the Design System Doc to append to planner prompts. Only used when designSystemDocEnabled is true.

switchboard.team.strictPrompts.description: Unified team prompt rigor. When enabled, both planner and reviewer prompts use strict mode. Default is light mode.

switchboard.review.strictPrompts.description: Deprecated: use team.strictPrompts instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

switchboard.planner.strictPrompts.description: Deprecated: use team.strictPrompts instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

switchboard.plans.defaultOpenMode.description: Default mode for opening plans from the sidebar.

switchboard.review.autoRefresh.description: Automatically refresh the Plan Review panel when the underlying plan file changes on disk

switchboard.security.strictInboxAuth.description: Require session token authentication for all inbox dispatch messages. Disable only for development.

switchboard.research.localFolderPaths.description: Paths to local folders containing research files (.md, .txt, .markdown, .rst, .adoc). Paths may be absolute or relative to the workspace root, and support ~ for home directory.

switchboard.research.htmlFolderPaths.description: Paths to local folders containing HTML prototype files (.html, .htm) for preview in the HTML Previews tab. Paths may be absolute or relative to the workspace root, and support ~ for home directory.

switchboard.research.designFolderPaths.description: Paths to local folders containing design system files (.md, .txt, .markdown, .rst, .adoc) and image assets (.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .svg). Paths may be absolute or relative to the workspace root, and support ~ for home directory.

switchboard.kanban.completedLimit.description: Maximum number of cards shown in the Kanban Completed column (1–500). Higher values may slow rendering.

switchboard.kanban.dbPath.description: Custom file path for the Kanban database (e.g., ~/Google Drive/Switchboard/kanban.db). If empty, uses the default .switchboard/kanban.db in the workspace root. Use this to store the DB in a cloud-synced folder for multi-machine handover.

switchboard.kanban.controlPlaneRoot.description: Explicit Control Plane folder override. Must point to a folder containing .switchboard/kanban.db. Leave empty to use auto-detect.

switchboard.workspaceDatabaseMappings.description: (DEPRECATED - Mappings are now stored in the database) Workspace-to-database mapping configuration. When enabled, redirects configured workspace folders to shared kanban.db paths.

enumDescriptions: Write targeted rules to .gitignore while keeping shared plans, reviews, sessions, and workflow files tracked (recommended)
Write rules to .git/info/exclude (local only, not committed)
Do not manage ignore rules (manual management required)
switchboard.workspace.ignoreStrategy.description: Strategy for excluding Switchboard files from git tracking.

switchboard.workspace.ignoreRules.description: Stored ignore rules used by the localExclude preset and the editable custom preset. Each entry is appended as a separate line.

switchboard.archive.dbPath.description: Path to DuckDB archive database for historical plan research (e.g., ~/GoogleDrive/SwitchboardArchives/{workspace}.duckdb). Leave empty to disable archiving.

switchboard.archive.autoArchiveCompleted.description: Automatically archive plans when moved to COMPLETED column.

switchboard.excludeReviewedBacklogFromDr.description: Hide plans in 'reviewed' and 'backlog' kanban columns from the sidebar dropdown.

switchboard.planWatcher.periodicScanEnab.description: Enable periodic scanning for plan files created outside the editor.

switchboard.planWatcher.scanIntervalMs.description: Interval in milliseconds between periodic scans for new plan files. Minimum 2s, maximum 5m.

switchboard.planAutoFetch.enabled.description: Enable auto-fetching and fast-forwarding of plans from the default branch on extension startup and periodically.

switchboard.planAutoFetch.intervalSecond.description: Interval in seconds between periodic auto-fetches. 60s keeps the git-native control-plane channel responsive; raise it to reduce background git fetches.

switchboard.planAutoFetch.remote.description: The git remote to fetch plans from.

switchboard.planAutoFetch.defaultBranch.description: The default branch name (e.g. 'main', 'master'). If empty, auto-detect via origin/HEAD.

switchboard.planAutoFetch.trustedAuthors.description: Optional list of trusted author emails. Defaults to local git config user.email.

switchboard.boardStateExport.description: Where (if anywhere) the kanban board state gets mirrored for remote/web-agent visibility. 'none' = no git footprint; 'read-only-snapshot' = publish a one-directional, read-only snapshot (board.json + board.md) to the orphan branch 'switchboard/board'. Notion/Linear are governed by their existing provider config, not this setting.

switchboard.boardStateExport.remoteUrl.description: Reserved. Git remote URL for the board-state export destination (currently unused — the read-only snapshot publishes to the repo's own orphan branch 'switchboard/board').

switchboard.planScanner.enabled.description: Master switch for the Plan Scanner: periodically scan AI IDE/agent folders for newly generated plan files and import them onto the kanban. Configure in Setup → Plan Scanner.

switchboard.planScanner.intervalSeconds.description: Seconds between Plan Scanner sweeps. Lower = plans appear faster; higher = less background work. Min 3s, max 5m.

switchboard.planScanner.presets.antigrav.description: Scan Google Antigravity brain plans (~/.gemini/antigravity*/brain/*/implementation_plan.md). Auto-skipped if the folders don't exist.

switchboard.planScanner.presets.windsurf.description: Scan Windsurf / Devin Desktop plans (~/.devin/plans, ~/.windsurf/plans, and <repo>/.devin/plans, <repo>/.windsurf/plans). Auto-skipped if the folders don't exist.

switchboard.planScanner.presets.cursor.description: Scan Cursor plans (~/.cursor/plans and <repo>/.cursor/plans). Auto-skipped if the folders don't exist.

switchboard.planScanner.presets.claudeCo.description: Scan Claude Code plans (~/.claude/plans and <repo>/.claude/plans). Auto-skipped if the folders don't exist.

switchboard.planScanner.scanSwitchboardP.description: Include the workspace's own .switchboard/plans folder in periodic scans.

switchboard.planScanner.customSources.description: Custom plan-file sources for any other tool. Each entry: { label, scope ('global'|'workspace'), globs (array of paths; ~ expands to home, <repo> expands to each workspace root) }.

switchboard.planScanner.chatPlanDestinat.description: Directories the chat/consultation agent is told to write plans to. Empty = the workspace's .switchboard/plans folder. Add more than one to let the agent choose. Each path is also scanned for ingestion. Tokens: ~ expands to home, <repo> expands to each workspace root.

switchboard.autoSelectFirstWorkspace.description: Automatically select the first workspace folder on activation if no kanban workspace is selected.

switchboard.statusBar.showTerminalContro.description: Controls visibility of the Agents/Clear/Reset terminal buttons on the status bar.

switchboard.statusBar.showKanbanButton.description: Controls visibility of the Open Kanban button on the status bar.

switchboard.statusBar.showArtifactsButto.description: Controls visibility of the Open Artifacts Panel button on the status bar.

switchboard.statusBar.showDesignButton.description: Controls visibility of the Open Design Panel button on the status bar.

switchboard.statusBar.showProjectButton.description: Controls visibility of the Open Project Panel button on the status bar.

switchboard.statusBar.compactMode.description: When true, groups enabled Switchboard status bar actions into a single compact hub dropdown. When false, shows individual buttons as before.

switchboard.persistPanels.description: Automatically reopen Kanban, Project, Planning, and Design panels when VS Code restarts.

switchboard.hideGuidedSetup.description: Hide the Guided Setup button in the sidebar (for users who have completed onboarding).

switchboard.theme.cyberPanel.description: Deprecated. The Cyber Panel theme is now always active.
switchboard.theme.cyberPanel.deprecationMessage: switchboard.theme.cyberPanel is deprecated. The Cyber Panel theme is now always on. Use switchboard.theme.disableCyberAnimation to disable the animated sweep beam.

switchboard.theme.disableCyberAnimation.description: Disable the animated rolling CRT sweep beam in the Cyber Panel theme.

switchboard.theme.disableCyberScanlines.description: Disable the static CRT scanline texture in the Afterburner theme. The rolling sweep animation is controlled separately.

switchboard.theme.colourKanbanIcons.description: Render kanban board icons in full colour at rest (terracotta for Claudify) instead of flat grey with a colour click-flash. Only affects the Claudify theme.

switchboard.theme.pixelFont.description: Claudify only: render document H1 headings in the pixel display font. Turn off to render H1 in the body font like H2–H6.

switchboard.theme.ultracodeAnimation.description: Afterburner only: play the full-screen ULTRACODE animation when Feature Ultracode is switched on in the kanban board.

enumDescriptions: Afterburner — Cyan immersive theme: Hanken headings (no glow), scanlines and glass always on, CRT sweep toggleable
Claudify — Claude terracotta accent, Hanken headings, flat neutral surface
switchboard.theme.name.description: Visual theme for Switchboard webviews. Applies to Setup, Kanban, and Planning panels.

switchboard.design.externalFilePollMs.description: Poll interval (ms) for detecting externally-created files in Design panel folder tabs (HTML Previews, Images, Briefs) while the panel is visible. 0 disables polling (falls back to watcher + tab-reenter only).

switchboard.memo.hotkey.description: Hotkey to open the memo. Use VS Code keybinding format (e.g. 'ctrl+shift+alt+m'). Note: changing this requires a window reload to take effect.

switchboard.statusBar.showMemoButton.description: Show a dedicated memo button in the status bar.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:integration:all: npm run test:regression:plan-sync && npm run test:regression:native-project-api && node src/test/integrations/run-integration-tests.js all
